assertions.description: INCORRECT: The bottom_pcb is a pure mechanical PCB (0 electronic components, 4 NPTH mounting holes, no SMD or THT components). The completeness check sets complete=false because has_pth_drill=false. For mechanical or panel PCBs with only mounting holes, NPTH-only drill files are expected and correct. The completeness algorithm should not require PTH drill when the board has no electronic components.
